content: You’ve requested to change the email address on your {{productName}} account. To proceed, please sign in using your current credentials.

comment.text: This is a message displayed to a user who has initiated an email address change for their account. It informs them that they need to sign in with their current credentials to continue the process. The `{{productName}}` variable will be replaced with the name of the product (e.g., ONLYOFFICE DocSpace).

usage.context:
</Text>
 
 <Text fontSize="13px" fontWeight={400} className="confirm-email-change">
 <Trans
 t={t}
 i18nKey="ConfirmEmailChangeText"
 ns="Login"
 values={{
 productName: getBrandName("ProductName"),
 }}
 />
